settings.title: Settings

settings.glucoseRemindersSubtitle: Four reminders: fasting, pre-meal, post-meal, and random

settings.waterGoalAutoHint: If you leave it as 0, the app automatically uses the recommended value.

settings.glucosePreMealReminderBodyWithoutLast: Before your meal, take a quick glucose reading to stay on track.
settings.glucosePreMealReminderBodyWithLast: Before your meal, take a quick glucose reading to stay on track. Your last pre-meal glucose was {{value}} mg/dL.
settings.glucosePostMealReminderBodyWithoutLast: After your meal, take a moment to check your glucose.
settings.glucosePostMealReminderBodyWithLast: After your meal, take a moment to check your glucose. Your last post-meal glucose was {{value}} mg/dL.

settings.glucoseRandomReminderBodyWithLast: How about checking your glucose now? Your last random reading was {{value}} mg/dL.
settings.waterReminderBodyWithRemaining: Time to hydrate. You still have {{remaining}} ml left to reach today's {{goal}} ml goal.
settings.waterReminderBodyGoalMet: You have already reached today's {{goal}} ml goal. Keep hydrating if you can.

settings.notificationsUnavailableMessage: The app could not configure local notifications on this device.

settings.invalidGlucoseFastingTime: Set a valid fasting glucose time in HH:MM format.

menu.title: Settings
menu.subtitle: Settings, import/export, help, and policy links in one place.
menu.appSettingsSubtitle: Goals, language, appearance, and local reminders
menu.transferSubtitle: Bring spreadsheets in, export data, and download templates
menu.helpSubtitle: How to log data and use the main features
menu.privacySubtitle: How data stays in the app and how files are shared

transfer.title: Import and Export
transfer.infoBody: Use CSV files to import or export weight, glucose, and water. The templates downloaded by the app already include the correct headers.
transfer.importWeightSubtitle: Reads a CSV with date and weight columns
transfer.importGlucoseSubtitle: Reads a CSV with date, glucose, measurementType, and observations
transfer.importWaterSubtitle: Reads a CSV with date and amount columns
transfer.exportWeightSubtitle: Generates a CSV with the full weight history
transfer.exportGlucoseSubtitle: Generates a CSV with the full glucose history
transfer.exportWaterSubtitle: Generates a CSV with the full water history
transfer.templateWeightSubtitle: Downloads a sample CSV ready to fill in
transfer.templateGlucoseSubtitle: Downloads a sample CSV ready to fill in
transfer.templateWaterSubtitle: Downloads a sample CSV ready to fill in
transfer.exportSuccessMessage: The {{type}} spreadsheet was generated with {{count}} records.
transfer.templateSuccessMessage: The {{type}} template was generated for download/sharing.
transfer.invalidTemplateMessage: The spreadsheet is not in the expected format. Download the in-app template and try again.
transfer.emptyFileMessage: The selected file is empty or only contains the header.
transfer.noValidRowsMessage: No valid rows were found to import.
transfer.fileUnavailableMessage: The selected file could not be read.
transfer.genericErrorMessage: This action could not be completed right now.

glucose.msgLow: Your glucose is a bit low. Consider eating a small snack with carbohydrates.
glucose.msgNormal: Your glucose is within the ideal range. Keep it up!
glucose.msgPre: Your glucose is above normal. Keep an eye on it and consult your doctor.
glucose.msgRisky: Your glucose is high. Seek evaluation and adjust your routine.
glucose.msgDefault: Keep track of your blood glucose. Click below to view reference values and better understand your current measurements.
glucose.observationsPlaceholder: Ex: Felt slightly dizzy in the morning...

history.title: Health History
history.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this record? This action is irreversible.
history.noData: No records found for this period.

help.title: Help
help.heroSubtitle: A quick guide to log data, configure reminders, and move spreadsheets.
help.sectionRecordsBody: Use the weight, glucose, and water screens to add data manually. The latest records appear first in history and also feed charts and reminders.
help.sectionNotificationsBody: In App settings you can enable weight, glucose, and water reminders, choose times, and set the notification sound for local alerts.
help.sectionTransferBody: The Import and Export area works with CSV files. Download a template before building your spreadsheet so the column names stay correct.

privacy.title: Policy
privacy.heroSubtitle: Summary of the app's current behavior for local storage and file sharing.
privacy.dataBody: Weight, glucose, water, and settings data are stored locally on the device using the app's own storage.
privacy.notificationsBody: Local reminders use data already saved on the device to build more useful messages, such as the last weight, last glucose value, and remaining water goal.
privacy.transferBody: When you export a spreadsheet or download a template, the app generates a local CSV file and opens the system share sheet so you can choose where to save or send it.
